_comment: SCA (src/ + xpi/) reviewed with --llm-review (via llm.js). Exercises the SCA two-pass add-on summary: the SOURCE pass over src/ (the displayed Summary of add-on) plus the PACKAGING pass over the built XPI, which re-judges the XPI-anchored unused-files recheck (orphan.js, made an LLM candidate by loader.js's dynamic loader, judged unused -> a finding). analyzeBuild also runs (callText classifies the build 'ok'). unsafe-html is the deterministic source finding (Comp.vue's innerHTML sink).
